description: Add https://codeberg.org/ctietze/mtp.el to thbemacs config. Provides Dired/Tramp integration for browsing and managing files on Android devices and e-ink tablets via MTP protocol. Requires libmtp system package. macOS-focused (no built-in GVFS).
title: Add mtp.el for MTP device file management

description: The custom markdown table renderer built in thbemacs init.el renders pipe-delimited markdown tables as properly formatted box-drawing tables that fit the viewport window width with cell content wrapping. Functions: thb/md-table-parse, thb/md-table-col-widths, thb/md-table-render-row, thb/md-table-format, thb/md-table-render-inline, thb/md-table-wrap-string. Integrates via :after advice on agent-shell-viewport--initialize. Should be extracted into agent-shell-viewport.el or a new agent-shell-table.el module.
title: Contribute markdown table renderer to agent-shell upstream

description: The f/b page navigation header hints are added via :around advice on agent-shell-viewport--update-header using cl-letf* to temporarily wrap agent-shell--make-header. This pattern could be generalized upstream to let users add custom header hints without modifying the package. Consider adding a hook or defcustom for extra bindings in agent-shell-viewport.
title: Contribute viewport header hints advice pattern to agent-shell
